questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Deadlock Conditions?
options: Inefficient scaling of Mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no-preemption, and circular wait conditions.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no-preemption, and circular wait conditions.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Mutual exclusion, hold-and-wait, no-preemption, and circular wait conditions scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
